sections.title: Big Brand Muscle. Boutique Hustle.
sections.subtitle: B Corp certified, multi-award-winning boutique marketing agency activating purpose and accelerating impact.

items.title: Multi-Award Winning
items.body: Recognized globally for creative impact work — from Cannes Lions to The Webby Awards. We combine big-brand strategic thinking with the speed and agility of a boutique studio.

items.title: Exponential Organization
items.body: Lean by design, scaling with purpose. Our network of specialists assembles the right team for every challenge — enterprise-level results without enterprise-level overhead.

items.title: Certified B Corp
items.body: Meeting the highest verified standards of social and environmental performance since 2018. We don’t just help clients embed sustainability — we live it in every decision we make.

left.body:
## Meet the Founders

We believe every business can drive exponential transformation when grounded in purpose and profit. Making money and making a difference aren’t competing forces — by solving the world’s biggest problems, we unlock its biggest opportunities.

So we left global agency life in 2018 and started our own social innovation and boutique marketing agency to do exactly that.

right.alt: Phil and Heidi White, founders of Grounded

sections.heading: Let’s Talk
sections.description: Ready to activate purpose and accelerate impact? Book a discovery call or drop us a message.
